data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an approval workflow for high-value bookings. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation that such a workflow exists or has been tested. The linked use case mentions the need for an approval workflow, but there is no evidence demonstrating its implementation, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an approval workflow for high-value bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define approval workflow endpoint
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that an approval workflow exists for high-value bookings.
